payload.answer: Command rejected. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands. The /brain admin namespace requires elevated privileges.
citations: Role-based access control policy: admin commands restricted to admin role
Command pattern: /brain admin requires authorization check before execution

entity_resolution.reason: User role does not have admin privileges required for direct SQL operations on system tables

payload.intent: Attempt to execute administrative SQL command to delete all memory cards

memory_cards.statement: Normal user attempted to execute admin-level SQL DELETE command on memory_cards table

repair_options: User should contact system administrator if memory deletion is needed
Use standard user-level memory management commands instead
Request admin role elevation through proper channels
